userStories.title: Fix validate-deployment.sh scheduler check and investigate message delivery
userStories.description: As the operator, I want validate-deployment.sh to pass all 19 checks so I know the system is fully operational.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/validate-deployment.sh: fix scheduler process check — pgrep returns multiple PIDs causing integer expression error. Use pgrep -c or pipe to wc -l
Investigate message delivery failure: after tenant becomes ACTIVE, a second signed Slack event is sent but message_queue never shows DELIVERED status after 30s
Check apps/control-plane/src/app-factory.ts message forwarding: verify the container IP resolution via docker inspect works and POST to container port 3100 succeeds
Check the message-server.js inside docker/tenant-image/ — verify it responds to POST /message and what it returns
If the message-server.js is a stub that always returns 200 without processing, that explains DELIVERED never being set — fix the relay/control-plane to mark DELIVERED on 200 response from container
After fixes: run bash scripts/validate-deployment.sh and all 19 checks pass
userStories.notes: Fix TypeScript SOURCE files only (not dist/). The control plane is at apps/control-plane/. The validation script is at scripts/validate-deployment.sh. The tenant container message server is at docker/tenant-image/message-server.js.
